basics.name: Bobby Roth
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: CompTIA Network+ certified IT support professional with hands-on experience troubleshooting network connectivity issues, configuring switches and VLANs, and providing technical support to end users. Strong background in customer service with proven communication and problem-solving skills developed through fast-paced customer-facing roles. Passionate about technology, quick to learn new systems, and committed to delivering exceptional support while continuously expanding my knowledge of networking, cybersecurity, and IT infrastructure.

work.summary: Provided Tier 1 technical support by troubleshooting network and connectivity issues while assisting customers with hardware and software problems.
highlights: Troubleshot network connectivity issues across routers, switches, and access points
Configured and supported VLANs, DHCP, NAT, and IP addressing
Performed switch configuration using CLI for port setup and VLAN assignments
Used ping, traceroute, and Wireshark to diagnose and resolve technical issues
Installed and maintained PoE access points and network switches
Documented support cases and communicated technical solutions to end users
Collaborated with team members to escalate and resolve complex technical issues

work.summary: Led daily store operations while delivering excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.
highlights: Supervised team members and delegated daily tasks
Handled cash register operations and balanced end-of-day transactions
Prepared food while maintaining quality and food safety standards
Resolved customer concerns professionally and efficiently
Trained new employees on store procedures and customer service

work.summary: Served as cashier, cleanup, cook role.
Operated cashier register taking in client orders for the front of the house as well as a second helper for drive thru orders
